issues_found: Source body contains only the overview/introductory section of the Monetary Policy Report; the full PDF report with detailed projections and analysis is not included in the source text. Key figures are accurately extracted from the overview, but more detailed policy deliberations are not available for verification.

Source published July 30, 2025—approximately 8 months before TODAY (2026-03-31). While monetary policy reports have clear archival value as historical policy documents, this age reduces confidence slightly.
human_review_reason: Record is accurate and well-constructed against available source text. Minor uncertainty arises from (1) source body being an overview rather than full report, and (2) the 8-month age of the document. Neither issue requires human intervention—the record is correctly formatted and factual claims are supported by the source.
